nodes.name: 多布羅加

nodes.name: 鸭科
nodes.summary: 鸭科（Anatidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联162种鸟类，如中华秋沙鸭、白背鸭、细斑树鸭等162种鸟类。

nodes.name: 爱尔兰岛
nodes.summary: 爱尔兰岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括红胸黑雁、粉脚雁、赤颈鸭等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 西伯利亚
nodes.summary: 西伯利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括红胸黑雁、雪雁、凍原豆雁等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 雁形目
nodes.summary: 雁形目（Anseriformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联166种鸟类，如中华秋沙鸭、角叫鴨、黑颈冠叫鸭等166种鸟类。

nodes.name: 红胸黑雁
nodes.summary: 红胸黑雁（Red-breasted goose，学名 Branta ruficollis），分类上属于雁形目，并归入鸭科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联211种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等211种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red-breasted goose breeds in Arctic Siberia, mainly on the Taymyr Peninsula, with smaller populations in the Gyda and Yamal peninsulas. Most winter along the northwestern shores of the Black Sea in Bulgaria, Romania and Ukraine (occasionally moving further southwest to Greece), but some winter in Azerbaijan. It is a rare vagrant to Ireland and other western European areas, where it is sometimes found with flocks of Brent or barnacle geese. However, since it is common in captive wildfowl collections, escapees outside its usual range are fairly frequent.Birds of Dawlish Warren: Red-breasted Goose Branta ruficollis

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: However, catastrophic population decline was avoided because they were able to alter their migration strategy and now winter in suitable habitats in Bulgaria and the Dobrogea region of Eastern Romania.{{cite journal | last1 = Sutherland | first1 = W.J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | year = 1993 | title = Factors affecting the feeding distribution of Red-breasted Geese Branta ruficollis wintering in Romania | journal = Biological Conservation | volume = 63 | issue = 1 | pages = 61–65 | doi=10.1016/0006-3207(93)90074-b| bibcode = 1993BCons..63...61S }} Late Pleistocene remains of the species have been found in Bulgaria, and it is featured on ancient Egyptian paintings, including the famous Meidum Geese.{{cite journal | last1 = Rozenfeld | first1 = S
